title: Affliction.
content:
God ne'er afflicts us more than our desert,
    Though He may seem to overact His part:
    Sometimes He strikes us more than flesh can bear;
    But yet still less than grace can suffer here.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Affliction."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
